description: MCP server configuration for InsightPulse AI / TBWA stack — expanded with Microsoft/Azure + official platform servers

cloudflare-audit-logs.description: Cloudflare Audit Logs MCP (official remote) - query audit logs, security event reports

cloudflare-browser.description: Cloudflare Browser Rendering MCP (official remote) - fetch pages, screenshots, convert to markdown

cloudflare.description: Cloudflare MCP (npm local) - Workers, Pages, DNS, KV, R2, D1, Zones, Firewall rules

playwright-ms.description: Playwright MCP (official Microsoft) - browser automation via accessibility snapshots, no vision needed

filesystem.description: Filesystem MCP (official reference) - secure file operations with configurable access controls

fetch.description: Fetch MCP (official reference) - web content fetching and conversion for efficient LLM usage

git.description: Git MCP (official reference) - read, search, and manipulate Git repositories

time.description: Time MCP (official reference) - time and timezone conversion (Asia/Manila default)

odoo-erp.description: Custom Odoo ERP MCP - accounting, BIR compliance, HR

digitalocean.description: Custom DigitalOcean MCP (legacy) - droplets, apps, deployments. Superseded by digitalocean-official

superset.description: Custom Superset MCP - dashboards, datasets, charts

vercel.description: Custom Vercel MCP (legacy) - projects, deployments, logs. Superseded by vercel-official

pulser.description: Custom Pulser MCP - agent orchestration, run management

speckit.description: Custom SpecKit MCP - spec bundle enforcement, validation

memory.description: Verified memory system - repository-scoped, cross-agent learning with citation verification

agent-coordination.description: A2A coordination - agent registry, discovery, inter-agent invocation following Microsoft's MCP pattern

notes.custom_servers: Servers with status=source_only require 'npm run build' before use
notes.memory_docs: See docs/VERIFIED_MEMORY.md for memory system usage
notes.microsoft_remote_servers: M365 servers use remote HTTP endpoints at mcp.agent365.microsoft.com - require Azure AD auth
notes.azure_namespaces: Azure MCP supports --namespace flag to limit scope: storage, cosmosdb, sql, dataverse, monitor, appservice, functions, etc.
notes.digitalocean_migration: digitalocean-official replaces legacy custom digitalocean server. Use --services flag to limit scope
notes.vercel_migration: vercel-official (remote OAuth) replaces legacy custom vercel server
notes.cloudflare_options: Three Cloudflare options: npm package (full control), observability remote (analytics), bindings remote (Workers/KV/R2/D1)
